amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 14 — paragraph 3 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 14 — paragraph 3 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

3. Human oversight shall be ensured through either one or all of the following measures:

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3. Human oversight shall take into account the specific risks, the level of automation, and context of the AI system and shall be ensured through either one or all of the following types of measures:
commission_text: 3. Human oversight shall be ensured through either one or all of the following measures:
parliament_text: 3. Human oversight shall take into account the specific risks, the level of automation, and context of the AI system and shall be ensured through either one or all of the following types of measures:
